description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §2.1, §8.2 compose, §8.3 add_to.

Work:
- Term::Call { fn, args, cont: Cont{fn_id, captured} }:
    1. v_k1 = call fz_alloc_closure(N_captures)
    2. store func_addr(cont_fn) at v_k1+16
    3. store captured[i] at v_k1+24+8i
    4. return_call %fn(args..., v_k1)
- Term::CallClosure: same, but for v_f indirect: v_code=load f+16; return_call_indirect(args..., f, v_k1).
- Cont fn bodies are compiled with sig_cont shape (result:i64, self:i64) tail.

Acceptance:
- §8.2 compose target clif shape matches.
- §8.3 add_to lambda escape: lambda_z body has zero allocs; add_to has one fz_alloc_closure.
- closure_typed_captures fixture passes.
title: fz-cps.1.d: Call/CallClosure build cont inline
